session_log.summary: Expanded validation: all 18 T0 tests verified passing. Fixed 4 DB records with provider_used='mock' (deleted and re-seeded with claude_cli). Verified integrator wiring (settings, history, GitHub panels). No regressions. 0 mocks remaining.

Verified and marked 34 T1 tests passing. All endpoints already working from previous implementation sessions. Auth (7), CRUD (11), Data (8), GitHub repos (4), Validation (4). Remaining 11 T1 tests need full pipeline completion runs.

Completed all 11 remaining T1 tests via real pipeline runs. Fixed retry_of bug in optimize.py (retry endpoint wasn't linking new records to originals). T1 tier complete: 45/45. Tier boundary reached, exiting for validator.

Fixed session access inconsistency in optimize.py and optimizations.py (req.cookies.get -> req.session.get). 2 field mismatches already handled by NavigatorHistory mapping. 2 orphan components (Toast, RepoPickerModal) need coding agent to create state infrastructure. All navigator panels verified working via Puppeteer.

Expanded validation at T1 tier boundary: 62/63 tests verified passing. 1 regression: #12 (MCP server not running — WebSocket transport bug confirmed, already tracked as w8_1/a8_1). Marked #12 as passes:false. Code integrity audit clean: 0 mocks, 0 stubs, 0 TODOs in project source. Frontend build clean, 0 console errors. All navigator panels and API endpoints verified working.

active_warnings.message: MCP server is NOT running. FastMCP.run(transport='websocket') raises ValueError — FastMCP only supports 'stdio', 'sse', 'streamable-http'. The spec requires WebSocket (ws://127.0.0.1:8001/ws). Fix: replace mcp_server.run(transport='websocket') with a custom websockets.serve() loop using mcp.server.websocket.websocket_server. See next_actions a8_1 for exact implementation. All MCP-dependent tests are blocked until this is fixed. Test #12 regressed to false. Dependencies (mcp, websockets packages) are already correctly installed — this is an implementation issue only.

blocked_tests.title: MCP server starts on port 8001
blocked_tests.blocker: FastMCP.run(transport='websocket') raises ValueError. MCP server crashes on startup. Needs custom websockets.serve() loop — see a8_1.

next_actions.action: Toast.svelte exists as orphan component (frontend/src/lib/components/shared/Toast.svelte) but is never imported. Needs: (1) a toast store to manage global toast state (message, type, visible, auto-dismiss), (2) import Toast into +layout.svelte as a global overlay, (3) wire toast.show() calls from key user actions (forge completion, errors, copy-to-clipboard). The component itself is complete.

Fix MCP WebSocket transport in backend/app/mcp_server.py. FastMCP.run(transport='websocket') is invalid — FastMCP only supports stdio/sse/streamable-http. Replace the __main__ block with a manual websockets.serve() loop. Implementation: (1) import asyncio, websockets, and 'from mcp.server.websocket import websocket_server as ws_handler' at the top. (2) Replace 'mcp_server.run(transport="websocket")' with: async def main(): await create_tables(); mcp = create_mcp_server(); async with websockets.serve(lambda ws: ws_handler(mcp._mcp_server, ws), settings.MCP_HOST, settings.MCP_PORT): logger.info(f'MCP server on ws://{settings.MCP_HOST}:{settings.MCP_PORT}/ws'); await asyncio.Future(). (3) Call asyncio.run(main()) instead of the current run() call. The websockets package is already in requirements.txt. Verify fix by running 'python mcp_server.py' and confirming it starts without ValueError. Test #12 (MCP server starts on port 8001) was regressed to false by validator session 8 because of this bug.

RepoPickerModal.svelte + RepoBadge.svelte exist as orphan components (frontend/src/lib/components/github/) but are never imported. NavigatorGitHub already has inline repo selection. The modal could be used from ContextBar when adding @repo context chips (currently just adds a chip without selection UI). Needs: state management for showing the modal and connecting selection to the context chip system.

server_state.notes: Backend using claude_cli provider. Frontend dev server on 5199. MCP server NOT running (WebSocket transport bug — see w8_1 and a8_1, test #12 regressed). DB at backend/data/promptforge.db with 3 tables (optimizations, github_tokens, linked_repos) and proper indexes. 18 records in DB (11 completed pipeline runs). T0: 17/18 (test #12 regressed), T1: 45/45 complete.
